name: Orlandi Valuta
description_short: Orlandi Valuta operates as a Western Union agent network offering money transfer, check cashing, and bill payment services across multiple U.S. locations.
description_long:
Orlandi Valuta functions as a Western Union agent and money services provider, operating a network of physical locations primarily across Colorado and New Mexico. The company leverages the Western Union brand and infrastructure to deliver financial services to underbanked and immigrant communities. Their location portal (locations.orlandivaluta.com) integrates Western Union's comprehensive service ecosystem, allowing customers to access services through partner agents rather than directly owned branches.

The platform offers core money transmission and cash access services including sending money domestically and internationally, receiving money transfers, picking up cash, tracking transfers in real-time, and paying bills online. Customers can also access Western Union Rewards, mobile top-up services, prepaid card options, and inmate payment services. The website supports multiple languages including English, Spanish, Haitian Creole, Chinese, French, and Vietnamese, reflecting their target demographic of immigrant and multilingual communities.

Orlandi Valuta's distinguishing feature is its agent-based model rather than company-owned branch network. They partner with existing retail businesses—grocery stores, gift shops, and check-cashing services—to distribute Western Union services. This approach allows rapid geographic expansion and integration into community-based retail locations. The multilingual platform and partnership with businesses serving Latino and immigrant communities demonstrates strategic positioning in underserved markets.

A significant limitation is the lack of independent company information on the website. The portal displays only Western Union branding and services without distinct Orlandi Valuta corporate identity, making it difficult to assess company-specific policies, leadership, or unique value propositions. Customers accessing the site receive the full Western Union experience rather than proprietary Orlandi Valuta offerings, suggesting the company primarily operates as a distribution partner rather than an independent financial services provider.
address: Time Food Mart, 2101 Dunlavy St, Houston, TX 77006

company_info.headquarters: Time Food Mart, 2101 Dunlavy St, Houston, TX 77006

pros: Multi-language support in 6 languages (English, Spanish, Haitian Creole, Chinese, French, Vietnamese)
Real-time transfer tracking available for money sent through Western Union
Multiple service options beyond check cashing including bill pay, mobile top-up, and inmate payments
Network of 7+ agent locations across Colorado and New Mexico with extended hours
Western Union Rewards program available to customers for loyalty benefits
Mobile accessibility through Western Union platform
Same-day money pickup at agent locations for received transfers
cons: No independent company website or corporate information—entirely Western Union-branded with limited transparency about Orlandi Valuta as a company
Limited geographic presence shown (only 7 locations across two states, mostly Colorado)
No pricing information or fee transparency displayed on the location portal
Agent locations often close until 8:00-9:00 AM with no evening or weekend hours shown
Western Union money transfer services typically carry substantial fees that may not be competitive with fintech alternatives
best_for: Spanish-speaking and immigrant communities needing multilingual money transfer services
Customers seeking to send money internationally through Western Union's established network
Unbanked and underbanked individuals in Colorado and New Mexico requiring cash access and bill payment
diagnosis: Orlandi Valuta is best for immigrant and multilingual communities in Colorado and New Mexico who need reliable money transfer and cash access services through Western Union's established network. The main caveat is that this is an agent-based distribution model rather than an independent company, so customers receive standard Western Union services and fees without company-specific differentiation or transparency about Orlandi Valuta's own operations and policies.
services: Money order services (implied through check-cashing category)
